# Facundo Roffet

> Doctoral researcher in deep learning and neuroscience at UNS–CONICET, Bahía Blanca, Argentina.

## About
- Personal portfolio and course notes site
- Research focus: deep learning applied to whole-brain fMRI analysis and neurodegeneration
- Also covers MLOps, philosophy, game theory, earth sciences

## Notes
- /notes/mlops_1.html: Weights & Biases platform (experiment tracking, W&B Weave, MLOps pipeline)
- /notes/losses.html: Taxonomy of deep learning loss functions
- /notes/decision_making_1.html: Game theory (Nash equilibrium, repeated games, Axelrod tournaments)
- /notes/philosophy_1.html: Ancient philosophy
- /notes/philosophy_2.html: Medieval and Renaissance philosophy
- /notes/philosophy_3.html: Non-Western philosophy
- /notes/weather_and_climate.html: Weather and climate fundamentals

- https://doi.org/10.3390/data10080123

- https://doi.org/10.3390/mca29030041
